heading: Effective date of certain sections
label: 78hh–1 Effective date of certain sections
text: This Act shall become effective on ; except that clause (2) of subsection (f) of section 78 of this title, and subsections (a) and (d) of section 78 of this title, shall become effective ninety days after , and that clause (3) of subsection (f) of section 78 of this title shall become effective six months after .May 27, 1936May 27, 1936May 27, 1936lol
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , popularly known as the Unlisted Securities Trading Act, which enacted sections 78–1, 78–1, 78–2, and 78hh–1 of this title, and amended sections 78, 78, 78q, 78r, 78t, 78u, 78w, and 78ff of this title.act May 27, 1936, ch. 46249 Stat. 1375loolo
CodificationSection was not enacted as a part of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 which comprises this chapter.
